summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nova AI application after design modernization (iteration 2). All features working perfectly with new purple color scheme, pill-shaped buttons, and glass-morphism effects. 100% success rate across all test scenarios.

minor_issues.issue: Console warning about setState during render in BrowserRouter/Login components
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, just development console warning
minor_issues.note: React development warning that doesn't affect user experience

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero headline 'The AI Agent Economy Is Broken. We Are Fixing It.'
Purple gradient text 'We Are Fixing It.' displays correctly
Navbar shows text-only logo 'nova.ai' (no image)
Waitlist form success flow - email submission shows 'You're on the list.' toast
Waitlist form validation - empty email shows error toast
Academy page navigation shows 'Coming Soon' badge and correct subtext
Marketplace displays 3 agent cards with disabled Rent/Buy buttons
Login page shows centered login card with glass-morphism styling
Login validation - wrong email shows 'Currently in private beta. Please join the waitlist.' error
Admin login (admin@nova.ai) successfully redirects to Studio
Studio page displays all 3 panes: chat, canvas with 4 nodes, code preview
Deploy Agent button shows success toast notification
Chat send functionality shows toast notification
Navbar shows 'Log out' button after admin authentication
Footer displays '© 2026 Nova AI' and mailto contact link
Logout functionality returns to home and shows 'Log in' button
Protected route /studio redirects to /login when not authenticated
Purple color scheme (#8B5CF6 primary, #A78BFA hover) implemented correctly
Pill-shaped buttons (rounded-full) styling verified
Glass-morphism cards (bg-white/[0.03], rounded-2xl) styling verified
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
